chunks.text:
Narrator: Once upon a time, in a cozy little den...
Little Bear: Good morning, Mama!
Mother Bear: Good morning, my little one. Did you sleep well?
Narrator: Little Bear looked out the window and saw the world covered in snow.

Little Bear: Mama, can we go play outside? Please?
Mother Bear: After breakfast, my dear.
Narrator: And so they had a warm breakfast together before their snowy adventure.
